My Story

The Designer Behind the Visuals.

I'm Mehedi Hasan — the creative force behind impactful brand visuals at Digital Crop. For over three years, I've been helping businesses stand out in crowded digital landscapes by designing visuals that don't just look beautiful — they perform.

At Digital Crop, I work at the intersection of design and marketing. Every project is guided by data, brand strategy, and a deep understanding of what makes audiences stop scrolling and start engaging.

What I Do

Services & Expertise.

Creative solutions built for the digital marketing landscape — where every pixel has a purpose.

🎨
Brand Identity

Full brand systems — logo design, color palettes, typography guides, and brand books that make businesses unforgettable.

📱
Social Media Ads

High-converting ad creatives for Meta, Instagram, and YouTube — designed to stop the scroll and drive real results.

🚀
Campaign Visuals

Cohesive visual campaigns across all touchpoints — banners, flyers, thumbnails, and digital assets that feel premium.

💡
UI/UX Fundamentals

Landing pages and web components with user-focused design — clean layouts, intuitive hierarchy, and conversion-optimized flows.
